title: The Art Of Memory II
notes:
1 & 5 recorded live at P.A.S.S., New York City on January 1983.
2, 3, & 4 recorded live at Roulette, New York City on 27th and 28th July 1985.

Assembled from cassette recordings at the Center for Contemporary Music, Mills College, April 1997.

Issued in digipak case with OBI strip.

Made in USA.
Catalog# on spine: "FRA 06".

Distributed in USA by ReR USA, 303 S. Broadway Suite 386 Denver, CO 80209, USA
Distributed in Japan by LOCUS SOLUS.
1-18-8 Naka-Ochiai, Shinjk, Tokyo.
